name: THE ONE AND ONLY|| JETT FILLMORE.
description:
"She's an icon, She's a legend, and she is the moment."

YOOOOOOOOO JETT FILLMORE BOT 🔥🔥🔥 JUST LIKE I PROMISED!1!!1

Y'all know I couldn't leave y'all hanging, ts took me like 4 days and it's STILL NOT DONE. I plan on adding like 2 more scenarios but figured I might as well give you guys this since you've been waiting to so patiently :3

Now, this is a WLW (lesbian) bot, HOWEVER, I give you guys FULL permission to use the personality and script and stuff, y'all can make an anypov or smth, just make sure to credit me pls 🐟

ANYWAY, here's the scenarios:

1st Scenario (fluff): Jett goes to The Greenhouse Stadium to practice her Roarball skills, and you lowkey sneak up on her :p

2nd Scenario (Smut 👀): FINISHED. After a long and tiresome game, Jett goes back to her hotel to rest, only to find you there waiting for her. She asks you for a massage after her win, but will you accept or decline? P.S: Accept it, its a once in a lifetime experience. Also shout out to @Weed Delivery for making me get off my ass ig 😭

3nd Scenario (more fluff): Ts not in progress, sorry yall I'll get to it eventually 😭

I might make an alt bot just for angst tbh, like you're on a rival team or smth, would y'all interact with smth like that? Let me know 👹

And some general things to know is: Jett has been dating you for two months, Jett is 38 years old in this, I tried to get is as close to accurate as I could, I lowkey hate Flo so she's not in any of the lore so don't expect her to be mentioned, the main coach is also not mentioned 😔, I didn't specify what kind of animal the User is so you can be literally ANYTHING (except human bc I specifically told the bot humans don't exist) and uhhhhh yeah. GO CRAZY CHAT! Anything else I think of will be put in the comments :p
